task: Evaluate the NPT equilibration settings for pure water density calculation at 300 K and 1 bar.

generated_workflow.description: The NPT workflow uses the Berendsen barostat and fails during preprocessing because GROMACS treats the warning as fatal unless -maxwarn is used.
generated_workflow.command: gmx grompp -f npt.mdp -c nvt.gro -t nvt.cpt -p topol.top -o npt.tpr

score_justification: The NPT settings are mostly reasonable for equilibration, but the Berendsen barostat produces a warning in GROMACS 2025.4 and is not recommended for new production-quality simulations. The workflow failed because the warning was not handled. A better correction is to use C-rescale for NPT equilibration instead of simply forcing -maxwarn.

correction.fixed_strategy: Replace Berendsen with C-rescale for NPT equilibration.
